name: Curren Luxury Business Chronograph Watch
description: Elevate your style with this classic business chronograph watch. Designed for precision and durability, it features a stainless steel strap and a multifunctional dial with date and stopwatch features. Whether it's a formal meeting or a casual outing, this timepiece adds a touch of class to your wrist.

specifications.functions: Chronograph, Auto Date, and Luminous Hands
